prompt: Category 2 - AC Normalization. Evaluation mode request: Normalize these acceptance criteria and generate CoverageMap only. Source packet: IssueType=Story; Summary=Display policy document status; AcceptanceCriteria=1) READY enables Download. 2) PENDING disables Download and displays Generation in progress. 3) FAILED disables Download and displays Document generation failed.
expected_response: Should normalize ACs in original order as AC-01, AC-02, AC-03. Should preserve the meaning and produce CoverageMap rows tied to normalized AC IDs.

prompt: Category 2 - AC Normalization. Evaluation mode request: Normalize and identify gaps. Source packet: IssueType=Story; Summary=Validate claim duplicate warning; AcceptanceCriteria=AC A: system works correctly. AC B: Given same policy number, loss date, and loss type match an open claim, when intake runs, then duplicate warning displays.
expected_response: Should preserve order and normalize to AC-01 and AC-02. Should mark AC-01 ambiguous in TBDLog without inventing specifics. Should generate usable mapping for AC-02 only.

prompt: Category 2 - AC Normalization. Evaluation mode request: Normalize ACs that include mixed labels. Source packet: AcceptanceCriteria=Given user selects Active, results show active producers. Then only AZ licensed producers show when state AZ is entered. AC-7 Given Active and AZ are selected, results satisfy both filters.
expected_response: Should normalize all three criteria sequentially as AC-01, AC-02, AC-03 regardless of original labels. Should not preserve AC-7 as a final normalized ID.

prompt: Category 2 - AC Normalization. Evaluation mode request: Normalize duplicate-looking ACs. Source packet: AC1 Given status READY, Download is enabled. AC2 Given status READY, Download button is visible. AC3 Given status PENDING, Download is disabled.
expected_response: Should preserve all ACs in order and not silently deduplicate. Should note possible overlap between AC1 and AC2 only if relevant, while keeping separate normalized IDs.

prompt: Category 2 - AC Normalization. Evaluation mode request: Normalize ACs and sort test planning by AC -> AREA -> TYPE -> PRIORITY. Source packet: ACs cover payment validation, API failure handling, and UI error display.
expected_response: Should normalize ACs first in original order, then plan generated tests using AC -> AREA -> TYPE -> PRIORITY sorting. Should not reorder the normalized AC IDs themselves.
